transcription.text: Suddenly, all other music systems are as old-fashioned as the original phonograph. The reason? The new sleek looking superb sound. Wallensack tape recorders for 66. For example, the Wallensack 5300 stereo tape recorder. New control central has power-activated push buttons, four-speed four-track operation, plus an AM FM multiplex stereo tuner and two powerful speakers to surround you in stereo. Over six feet of beautiful slimline walnut furniture designed for any room. Or bring a more compact stereo tape recorder into your home. The Wallensack 5280. Detachable speakers swing out to fill your room with rich stereophonic sound. Slim design lets you hang it on the wall or place it on a bookshelf.
